name: TEMPOROMANDIBULAR JOINT DYSFUNCTION
definition: internal derangement = abnormal relationship of disk to condyle
dominant_finding: irregular biconvex / rounded disk ← thickening of posterior band + reduction in mass of
distribution: irregular biconvex / rounded disk ← thickening of posterior band + reduction in mass of
discriminating_features: intrinsic disk lesion (change in shape + signal intensity):
irregular biconvex / rounded disk ← thickening of posterior band + reduction in mass of
reduction in normal intermediate to high SI of disk

general: intrinsic disk lesion (change in shape + signal intensity):
irregular biconvex / rounded disk ← thickening of posterior band + reduction in mass of
reduction in normal intermediate to high SI of disk
anterior (in up to 34% of asymptomatic volunteers), anterolateral, anteromedial, lateral,
anterior displacement of posterior band in front of condyle with abnormal stretching of
anterior displacement of meniscus without reduction at maximum mouth opening
"stuck disk" = fixed position of disk relative to glenoid fossa and articular eminence during
"locked jaw" = posterior band displaced beyond 1 o'clock position
